_comment: Binaries CI must provision, because these instances cannot be container-first.
An instance defaults to its chain's official image whenever that image exists AND
is pinnable to the version the live network runs (see src/instances/xplad.ts).
Everything listed here fails one of those two tests, so CI still has to build or
download a binary. Re-check a chain's `reason` when bumping it — if the upstream
image situation has changed, the entry should move to a container-first instance.
release-binaries.yml builds/uploads these once; ci.yml downloads them per run.

binaries.name: simd
binaries.reason: ghcr.io/cosmos/simapp only tags minor lines (v0.53, v0.54) — no patch-level pin

binaries.name: wasmd
binaries.reason: cosmwasm/wasmd publishes exact tags — candidate for a container-first instance

binaries.name: evmd
binaries.reason: no official image (ghcr.io/cosmos/evm is empty) — source build is the only option

binaries.name: gaiad
binaries.reason: ghcr.io/cosmos/gaia lags mainnet (latest tags v25/v26 vs live v27.5.0)

binaries.name: hermes
binaries.reason: relayer, not a chain — the hermes instance drives the CLI and its config files directly
